title: Richly Springy Pandan-Leaf Wrapped Turkey Ham Roll
description: A comforting Brazilian dish featuring turkey ham wrapped in double-rise bread with pandan leaves for a rich and springy texture. Keto-friendly option.
instructions: Slice turkey ham and double rise bread into rounds, about 3 cm thick.
Brush both sides of bread with vegetable oil.
Fold pandan leaves in half lengthwise and place a piece of bread on top. Place a slice of ham on the center of each folded leaf, then fold the leaf over to enclose the ham.
Place rolls seam-side down on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Bake for 25 minutes or until golden brown.
Remove from oven and serve immediately.
